description: Style NoteMixing classic natural prints with a hint of the exotic (nailing the latest summer trend) colour block this top from Tonga with for an effortlessly breezy vibe. For winter, you can smarten this up by layering it with a pastel toned cardi or a colour pop blazer. Product DetailsRed and black pinted round neck top, has elbow-length raglan sleeves, has a ballet-wrap style detail at the back with a keyhole fastened by tie-upsMaterial and Care92% nylon, 8% spandexHandwashDo not bleach or line dryDry on a flat surfaceSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
